Recent rewards activity

Rewards have no value until redeemed. See Rewards Program Agreement for details on earning and redeeming points. *For complete details about featured benefits and offers, please visit Card Benefits. Earnings displayed may be rounded. More detailed calculations are available in your transaction history. Final earnings will be reflected at the statement cycle.

Featured rewards for you

Introducing Chase Travel
Earn and redeem for flights, hotels, cruises, cars and more through Chase Travel.
Use daily rewards at Amazon.com
Redeem points as soon as the next day on millions of items at Amazon.com. There's no minimum to redeem.
Unlimited 5% back at Amazon.com
5% back at Amazon.com, Whole Foods Market and Amazon sites and stores with an eligible Prime membership.
More ways to earn
Earn 2% back at restaurants, gas stations, and on local transit and commuting, including rideshare.
Exclusive cardmember offers
Earn 10% back or more on a rotating selection of limited-time offers at Amazon.com with Prime Card Bonus.

Discover ways to use points

Shop with Points at Amazon.com
Instantly redeem points to pay for eligible Amazon.com purchases.
Travel
Go farther when you book travel through Chase.
Cash back
Redeem your points for a statement credit or direct deposit.

Travel with Chase and get rewarded

Book Flights
Book Hotels
View Trips

Explore ways to earn points

Need help?

For information about your credit card account or rewards program, call the number on the back of your card.
